title: Intelligence explosion as three-body recursion
summary: Recursive self-improvement is not one body but three: human intent, AI capability, and the coordination layer that preserves alignment. Capability rising without coordination breaks value alignment, which is the only check on runaway recursion.
source: Ch08 8.1 — Human Design <-> AI Self-Improvement <-> Recursive Enhancement; Tegmark three-body intelligence explosion

nodes.label: Human Intent
nodes.description: Values, goals, constraints set by designers

nodes.label: Value Alignment
nodes.description: How well AI acts reflects human intent

edges.description: Faster capability growth strains the coordination layer

identifiability_note: The coordination layer is partially observable; alignment is only measurable after capability gains, introducing an unobserved delay confounder.
